title: Profiles and colors
description: Manage the family members used across the planner and keep their color keys consistent.

invites.title: Invite a family member
invites.description: Invited family members can sign in, view the shared planner, add calendar items, request and plan meals, and update shopping.
invites.helper: Use this when someone already appears in your planner and now needs sign-in access.

toggle.includedHint: This member can appear in planning flows and assignments.
toggle.hiddenHint: This member stays available for sign-in, requests, and shopping updates only.

privacy.title: Deletion and privacy
privacy.description: Confirm destructive actions with your password. These flows are designed for permanent cleanup.

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account
deleteAccount.description: Leave the planner and remove your account. This is blocked if you are the only family member.

deleteFamily.title: Delete family
deleteFamily.description: Remove the entire family planner, including profiles, invites, events, meals, and shopping data.
